title: feat: catgpt light theme + BYOP auth + simplified code
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: CatGPT steps into the light
gist.blurb: CatGPT just got a cozy new light theme and a fresh comic header! We've also wired it up with BYOP auth and our native media service for a smoother meme-making experience.
gist.summary: CatGPT has been updated with a new light theme, integrated BYOP authentication, and migrated to Pollinations' native media service.
gist.impact: Users will enjoy a cleaner interface matching the main Pollinations aesthetic and can now seamlessly log in with their Pollinations account to unlock the meme generator.
gist.visual_concept: CatGPT app update. Key symbols: a cat (representing CatGPT), the pollinations bee (Polly), a light/cream theme, painting/decorating. Scene: Polly the bee and a cute pixel cat painting a dark room into a bright cream/light-themed room.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a fluffy pixel cat painting a dark wall with bright cream and soft pastel colors. The bee wears a tiny painter's beret. Soft lime green (#ecf874) paint buckets and warm lighting. Lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic, chunky sprites, Stardew Valley vibes. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
